risk_drivers: Commodity trade, sanctions, corruption, and cross-border payment exposure.
controls: EDD, sanctions screening, origin/destination checks, commodity documentation, and beneficial ownership review.
rule_basis: \b(oil and gas extraction|crude petroleum|natural gas extraction|petroleum refinery|petroleum products|fuel dealer|pipeline transportation of crude oil|pipeline transportation of natural gas|coal mining|metal ore mining|mining support)\b
notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

activity_title: Accounting, bookkeeping and auditing activities; tax consultancy
risk_drivers: Potential formation/management of legal persons, client money handling, opacity and nominee structures.
controls: EDD where services include company/trust formation or client money; UBO verification; source of funds; adverse media.
rule_basis: \b(legal services|offices of lawyers|lawyers|notary|notarial|accounting|bookkeeping|tax preparation|auditing|trust company|company formation|corporate services|management of companies|holding compan)\b
notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

activity_title: Leasing of intellectual property and similar products, except copyrighted works
risk_drivers: High-value assets, beneficial ownership opacity, third-party payments, and placement/layering typologies.
controls: EDD, property ownership checks, source of funds/wealth, purchaser/seller/agent verification, and transaction purpose review.
rule_basis: \b(real estate|property manager|lessors of real estate|land subdivision|real estate agent|real estate broker|appraisal|property developer|property)\b
notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

cdd_edd: EDD plus senior management approval / restricted appetite review

notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

risk_drivers: Cash-intensive and high velocity funds movement; established global ML typologies for gambling and betting.
cdd_edd: EDD plus senior management approval / restricted appetite review
controls: EDD, gaming license verification, source of funds/wealth, senior approval, cash controls, and enhanced transaction monitoring.
notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.

risk_drivers: Potential abuse for TF or sanctions evasion depending on geography, beneficiaries, funding sources and delivery channels.
controls: EDD for cross-border/high-risk geographies, donor/beneficiary checks, purpose and program validation, and sanctions screening.
rule_basis: \b(religious|grantmaking|giving services|social advocacy|human rights|environmental advocacy|civic and social organizations|business associations|professional organizations|labor unions|political organizations|charitable|charity|ngo|nonprofit|non-profit)\b
notes: Inherent industry risk only. Final customer risk must be adjusted for customer type, ownership/control, geography, products, delivery channel, expected activity and actual transaction behavior.
